$comment: Trusting this repo wires up the workshop: the SKILL.md files in .claude/skills/ (setup-workshop, setup-handy, coach-checkin) auto-load, Nick Nisi's `ideation` skill installs as a plugin from GitHub, and the aie-coach MCP server is defined in ../.mcp.json (approve it once on first trust, or run /mcp). The coach-checkin scripts live in the repo's skills/coach-checkin/ (imported by native/).
